blended.narrative: Revelstoke Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. The 14-day outlook shows 8 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 41°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Monday: 3.4" of snow, highs of 41°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: 2.7" of snow, highs of 50°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
